title: SimplyUpdated
description: This is a modpack thats add Vanilla+ features like Better world generation or like the new cooking system if you like Vanilla + modpacks this is a modpack for you
body:
This is a Vanilla+ modpack that combines many mods to add a bunch of new features like Better World Generation, new Cooking Mechanics and improved game performance. If you like Vanilla+, this is a modpack for you.

There are:
Cook and Chef villagers (from Chef's Delight)

thousands of building blocks (from Chipped)

sleeping bags and hammocks as alternatives to beds (from Comforts)

new redstone tools (from Create Fabric);

lots of new dishes and tools (from Farmer's Delight)

new terrain features such as rocks, bushes, trees, etc. (from Geophillic)

third-person animations (from Not Enough Animations)

an option to record, replay, and share your gameplay (from ReplayMod)

waves created by disturbing water (from Wakes)

lots of new structures such as dungeons, catacombs, mineshafts, workstation and many more (from multiple YUNG mods)
